steps.title: Divide the equation by the common factor
steps.content:
Looking at $3x^2 - 18x - 15 = 0$, all terms are divisible by 3. Divide both sides by 3:

$$x^2 - 6x - 5 = 0$$

steps.title: Isolate the target expression
steps.content:
We want to find $x^2 - 6x$. Add 5 to both sides of the equation from Step 1:

$$x^2 - 6x = 5$$
